scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx.cmd cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run android:sync && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug"
scripts.apk:release: npm run android:sync && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease"
scripts.aab:release: npm run android:sync && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat bundleRelease"
